name: plg-growth
description: Help product managers do Product-Led Growth work: assess readiness, analyze revenue drivers, choose acquisition models, run domain-specific AARMS analysis, design growth loops, operationalize product-led sales, and plan org transformation — all grounded in structured problem solving (issue trees, hypothesis trees, MECE, 80/20, Minto Pyramid) and proven PLG frameworks.
author: Konstantin Valiotti
